bakery style oreo stuffed cookies 🍪🥛    recipe: ingredients: ¾ cup salted butter, softened (170 g) ¾ cup packed brown sugar (150 g) ¼ cup granulated sugar (50 g) 1 large egg  1 tsp vanilla (5 g) 2 cups all-purpose flour (240 g) 1 tbsp cornstarch (8 g) ½ tsp baking soda (3 g) ¼ tsp salt (1.5 g) oreos, some whole some  roughly chopped  white chocolate (measure with your heart)  & choceur cookie and cream chocolate’s   instructions: cream the butter and sugars together  until smooth and slightly fluffy. mix in the egg and vanilla until fully combined. in a separate bowl, whisk together the flour, cornstarch, baking soda, and salt. fold the dry ingredients into the wet just until combined.  chop some of the oreos into small chunks ( leave some for topping ) and fold them in along with the white chocolate. scoop the dough into 8 portions, flatten and add an oreo inside and chocolate then shape into tall mounds. ( i flatten the top but keep them tall ) bake at 375°F for 11–14 minutes, until the edges are set and the centers are still soft. ( baking time may vary ) let cool to set the cookies!  i added moser roths white chocolate to the bottom & inside !    #oreo #cookies #chocolatechipcookies #Recipe #baking

Can you imagine what the world would be like without dentists? Any cavity or small chip in a tooth would turn into a serious problem, something you’d have to deal with using heavy forceps and tears. By the age of 30, most of us would probably be living on applesauce and soups. But thanks to dentists, orthodontists, and medical researchers, the situation has changed dramatically. Today, almost any dental issue can be treated or corrected. And what’s even more impressive - science is already getting close to growing new teeth. So yes, it’s worth simply saying: thank you to people in this profession. Because of them, we can almost not be afraid of sweets. #dentist#medicine#doctor#edit#teeth

매일 새벽 손으로 직접 만드는 수제만두, 젊은 사장님에게서 느껴지는 '할머니의 손맛' 📍망원 연만두  (주소: 서울 마포구 망원로 77 1층 연만두)   🔗네이버 지도: https://naver.me/5Kb3ejlY   🥟만두 한 판 8,500원 / 왕치즈군만두 1개 2,500원   📦택배 신청: 매주 월요일 오후 5시까지 문자 접수 (연락처: 010-5941- 7816)   망원시장의 소문난 만두 맛집 '연만두'. 많은 분이 연세 지긋한 할머니가 운영하실 거라 오해할 만큼 깊은 손맛을 자랑하는 곳입니다. 하지만 이곳의 주인공은 만두에 인생을 건 젊은 사장님이었는데요.  그 깊은 맛의 비결은 진심어린 정성에 있었습니다.  "기계는 재료를 뭉개버린다"는 철학 아래, 매일 새벽부터 나와 모든 재료를 일일이 손으로 버무리고 직접 빚으시더라구요. 재료 하나하나의 식감이 살아있는 꽉 찬 만두 속은 그렇게 사장님의 고집으로 완성됩니다.  워낙 정성껏 소량만 준비하기 때문에 금세 품절되기로 유명한데요. 방문 전 전화 주문이나 네이버 예약을 이용하시면 헛걸음 없이 바로 가져가실 수 있으니 꼭 참고하세요!   주문 즉시 튀겨주시는 치즈 군만두는 갓 튀겨낸 바삭한 식감 속에 고소하게 늘어나는 치즈와 만두 속의 조화가 그야말로 환상적입니다.. 정성과 맛, 어느 하나 빠지지 않는 망원동의 진정한 인생 만두를 만나보세요!   - Deep flavor hand-mixed every dawn: Finding 'Grandmother's Touch' in a Young Master 📍망원 연만두 'Yeon-Mandu' (77, Mangwon-ro, Mapo-gu, Seoul, Republic of Korea)   🔗 https://maps.app.goo.gl/jDhS1Q11mVTn1mBA9   'Yeon-Mandu' is a renowned dumpling spot near Mangwon Market, famous for a deep, traditional flavor that leads many to assume an elderly grandmother must be running the shop. Surprisingly, the true master behind these dumplings is a young man who has dedicated his life to this craft.   The secret to such profound flavor lies in his sincere devotion. Following his philosophy that "machines crush the ingredients' texture," he starts his day in the early hours of the dawn, hand-mixing and folding every single dumpling. This stubborn commitment is what creates the perfect filling, where the texture of each ingredient remains intact and vibrant.   Because each dumpling is made with such meticulous care in limited quantities, they are famous for selling out quickly. We highly recommend placing a phone order or using Naver Reservation before your visit to ensure you don't miss out!  Don't miss the Cheese Fried Dumplings, fried to order for a perfectly crispy texture. The harmony of the savory, melting cheese and the rich dumpling filling is simply heavenly. Come and experience a true "life-changing" dumpling in Mangwon-dong, where passion and tradition meet! 🥟 #서울맛집 #망원동 #koreanfood #seoul #streetfood

Ooey-Gooey Scoopable Nutella Cookie Pie🤤 Yields: 15-16 Chunky Cookies INGREDIENTS:  230g Cold Chopped Unsalted Butter  160g Caster Sugar  160g Light Brown Sugar  450g Chocolate Chunks or chips  475g Plain Flour  1 tsp Salt 3 tsp Baking Powder  3/4 tsp Baking Soda  2 Eggs  1 Egg Yolk  1 tsp Vanilla  INSTRUCTIONS: •Cut cling wrap into small squares. Scoop ½ teaspoon Nutella onto individual cling-wrap squares. Fold to seal and freeze until solid. (Repeat for however many Nutella stuffed cookies you plan to make.) •In a large mixing bowl, add the cold cubed butter and whisk until slightly creamy. Add the white sugar and light brown sugar, then whisk together until well combined and fluffy. •Add the eggs, vanilla extract, and chocolate chips or chunks. Whisk until fully incorporated. •Add the flour, baking powder, baking soda, and salt. Gently mix until just combined, do not overmix. •Portion the dough into 90g balls. Press a frozen Nutella piece into the centre of each dough ball, seal well, and roll into a smooth ball. •Place the stuffed cookie dough balls onto a tray and freeze for at least 30 minutes (or overnight for best results). •Preheat oven to 180°C (350°F). •Take any shape baking dish circle, square, rectangle anything and line it with parchment paper. Arrange frozen cookie dough balls in it leaving some space between them. •Bake for 10-15 minutes (timing depends on the type of pan) or until the tops are lightly golden while the centres remain soft and gooey. •Remove from the oven and let cool slightly. •Serve warm with ice cream and chocolate sauce enjoy!✨ NOTE: Store any extra dough balls in an airtight container or freezer bag and freeze for later. Il se présente généralement sous forme liquide ou crémeuse, contenu dans un tube avec une brosse applicatrice. Pt.4 | My fall bakery menu 🍂 Recipe below 👇🏼  Crumbl released their Dubai Chocolate Brownie, but why buy it when you can make an even better one at home? 🤎✨ Ingredients 🟤Brownie Base * 180g caster sugar * 2 eggs * 113g unsalted butter (for browning) * 170g chopped chocolate * 80g plain flour * 3 tbsp cocoa powder * ½ tsp salt 💚Kunafa Filling * 260g kunafa pastry (finely chopped) * 2 tbsp unsalted butter (for toasting kunafa) * 320g pistachio cream 🍫Chocolate Ganache * 120g double cream * 100g milk chocolate (chopped) Instructions 1. Preheat the oven to 170°C and line a baking pan with parchment paper. 2. Brown 113g of unsalted butter in a saucepan until golden, then set aside. 3. Melt the chopped chocolate in the microwave in short bursts until smooth, then stir in the browned butter and let cool slightly. 4. In a separate bowl, whisk the sugar and eggs until light and fluffy. 5. Add the chocolate butter mixture to the eggs and sugar, and whisk until fully combined. 6. Fold in the flour, cocoa powder, and salt until just incorporated. 7. Pour all of the brownie batter into the prepared pan, smooth the top, and bake for 22 minutes. Let cool completely in the pan. 8. In a pan over medium heat, melt 2 tbsp of butter. Add the finely chopped kunafa pastry and cook, stirring often, until golden and crisp. Let cool slightly. 9. Mix the toasted kunafa pastry with the pistachio cream until fully combined, then spread evenly over the cooled brownie. 10. Place the pan in the fridge for about 30 minutes to set. 11. For the ganache, place the double cream and chopped milk chocolate in a microwave-safe bowl. Heat in short bursts, stirring in between, until melted and glossy. 12. Pour the ganache over the pistachio-kunafa layer, spread evenly, and refrigerate, ideally overnight, or at least 1 hour before slicing. Enjoy! 🤎 #baking #dubaichocolate #brownies #Recipe #fall
